atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical examination reveals tenderness to palpation in the right flank

atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical examination reveals tenderness to palpation in the abdomen

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Blood pressure readings have ranged from one thirty to one forty-nine with a bottom number of seventy to eighty

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has a likely kidney stone

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has hypertension

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient has diabetes

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Prescribe oxycodone 5 mg every 6-8 hours as needed for pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Instruct the patient to strain urine to monitor for stone passage

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Refer to urology for further evaluation and management of recurrent kidney stones

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Refer to a registered dietitian for dietary counseling

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Schedule a follow-up appointment in four weeks
